# Visualization Scripts Note

## Scripts
- `generate_visualizations.py`
- `visualize_weights.py`

## Status
These scripts reference old configuration files (`config/config.yaml`) and old result files that may not exist in the current repository structure.

## Usage
These scripts are kept for reference but may need updates to work with current experiment results:
- Update file paths to use current result files
- Update to work without `config/config.yaml`
- Outputs (*.png, *.gif) are gitignored

## Generated Files (Gitignored)
- `viz1_overfitting_comparison.png`
- `viz2_feature_importance.png`
- `viz3_timeseries_performance.png`
- `viz4_hyperparameter_landscape.png`
- `weights_animation.gif`
- `weights_final.png`
